days.title: Meditation with Creation Frequency
days.telegram:
🧘 *DAY 2/7 — MEDITATION PRACTICE* 🧘
📅 Thursday, March 05

Today's practice: *10-minute meditation with the 37-73 Hz creation frequency*

1️⃣ Open https://quantumrealitycodes.com → go to the *Amplify* page
2️⃣ Set the timer to 10 minutes
3️⃣ Play the creation frequency
4️⃣ Hold your Reality Code from Day 1 in your mind
5️⃣ When the timer ends, write down anything you felt, saw, or realized

The 37-73 Hz range is called the 'Sound of Creation' — a frequency that resonates with the fundamental creative energy of the cosmos.

After your meditation, share what came through: a feeling, an image, a word, anything.

#Day2 #abundanceactivationChallenge

Saturday, March 07

We're halfway through the challenge. Time for a check-in.

What's shifted since Day 1?
